languages.text: "Разведал вот давеча: накрыло позиции, видать, знатных людей артиллерией. Знамена разлетелись, что стая птиц. Знать бы еще, кто такие".
languages.translation_comment: Стартует DL_KnowBombedSquad. Если/когда играет DL_KnowGaprakDead, то начинает играть DL_KnowGaprakAmbushed и Obj1_Add_GaprakBombed

traits.locale_text: "Разведал вот давеча: накрыло позиции, видать, знатных людей артиллерией. Знамёна разлетелись, что стая птиц. Знать бы еще, кто такие".

languages.translation_comment: Стартует DL_KnowBombedSquad. Если/когда играет DL_KnowGaprakDead, то начинает играть DL_KnowGaprakAmbushed и Obj1_Add_GaprakBombed

languages.text: "I recently heard that some noble positions got hit by artillery, it seems. The banners scattered like a flock of birds. I wish I knew who it was."
languages.original_text: "Разведал вот давеча: накрыло позиции, видать, знатных людей артиллерией. Знамена разлетелись, что стая птиц. Знать бы еще, кто такие".

traits.locale_text: "I recently heard that some noble positions got hit by artillery, it seems. The banners scattered like a flock of birds. I wish I knew who it was."
"I recently heard that some noble positions got hit by artillery, it seems. The banners scattered like a flock of birds. I wish I knew who it was."
"I recently heard that some noble positions got hit by artillery, it seems. The banners scattered like a flock of birds. I wish I knew who it was."

languages.text: “我最近听说，有几个贵族的阵地被炮火轰了，旗帜像受惊的鸟群一样四散飞落。真想知道是谁干的。”
languages.original_text: "I recently heard that some noble positions got hit by artillery, it seems. The banners scattered like a flock of birds. I wish I knew who it was."

traits.locale_text: “我最近听说，有几个贵族的阵地被炮火轰了，旗帜像受惊的鸟群一样四散飞落。真想知道是谁干的。”

languages.text: « Il paraît que les positions d'une maison noble ont été touchées par des tirs d'artillerie, j'ai entendu dire ça il y a peu. Leurs bannières se sont dispersées comme une nuée d'oiseaux. Je pourrais pas vous dire qui c'était, par contre. »
languages.original_text: "I recently heard that some noble positions got hit by artillery, it seems. The banners scattered like a flock of birds. I wish I knew who it was."

traits.locale_text: « Il paraît que les positions d'une maison noble ont été touchées par des tirs d'artillerie, j'ai entendu dire ça il y a peu. Leurs bannières se sont dispersées comme une nuée d'oiseaux. Je pourrais pas vous dire qui c'était, par contre. »

languages.text: "Geçenlerde birtakım soylu mevzilerinin topçu ateşiyle vurulduğunu duydum. Sancaklar, kuş sürüsü gibi dağılmış. Keşke kimin yaptığını bilseydim."
languages.original_text: "I recently heard that some noble positions got hit by artillery, it seems. The banners scattered like a flock of birds. I wish I knew who it was."

traits.locale_text: "Geçenlerde birtakım soylu mevzilerinin topçu ateşiyle vurulduğunu duydum. Sancaklar, kuş sürüsü gibi dağılmış. Keşke kimin yaptığını bilseydim."

languages.text: «Oí hace poco que habían atacado con artillería las posiciones de algunos nobles. Los estandartes volaron en bandada. Ojalá supiera quién es el responsable».
languages.original_text: "I recently heard that some noble positions got hit by artillery, it seems. The banners scattered like a flock of birds. I wish I knew who it was."

traits.locale_text: «Oí hace poco que habían atacado con artillería las posiciones de algunos nobles. Los estandartes volaron en bandada. Ojalá supiera quién es el responsable».

languages.text: "Ich hörte kürzlich, dass einige adelige Positionen offenbar von Artillerie getroffen wurden. Ihre Banner wurden versprengt wie ein Schwarm Vögel. Ich wüsste zu gern, wer das war."
languages.original_text: "I recently heard that some noble positions got hit by artillery, it seems. The banners scattered like a flock of birds. I wish I knew who it was."

traits.locale_text: "Ich hörte kürzlich, dass einige adelige Positionen offenbar von Artillerie getroffen wurden. Ihre Banner wurden versprengt wie ein Schwarm Vögel. Ich wüsste zu gern, wer das war."

languages.text: 「最近、砲撃で一部の貴人の陣が打たれたらしい。旗が鳥の群れのように散った。誰が打ったのか知りたい」
languages.original_text: "I recently heard that some noble positions got hit by artillery, it seems. The banners scattered like a flock of birds. I wish I knew who it was."

traits.locale_text: 「最近、砲撃で一部の貴人の陣が打たれたらしい。旗が鳥の群れのように散った。誰が打ったのか知りたい」
